summary: Phase 2 end-to-end testing complete. Backend: 49/49 pytest tests passed — 29/29 baseline (iteration_1) + 20/20 new Phase 2 (test_phase2.py) covering layanan-checklist, ticket-checklist (create+update+role guard), assignment flow (assign/unassign + operator-403 + audit log + activity log), pagination (limit/skip on /tickets), executive stats (shape + role guard + date filter), KB categories & articles full CRUD with search & operator role guard, audit log with entity/action/q filters. Frontend: verified koord SLA traffic-light cards (sla-on-time/sla-almost/sla-late), nav-executive/nav-audit/nav-kb visible only for koord, /executive page loads stat cards + exec-apply filter, /audit page accessible, /kb shows kb-new-button + kb-search-input for koord, /tickets shows infinite-scroll-sentinel and 'Semua data dimuat' (load-more-button is correctly hidden when total < PAGE_SIZE), master Layanan tab Edit dialog renders layanan-checklist-editor + layanan-checklist-input (Enter adds item), Create Ticket renders create-checklist with checklist-item-0..N for Reset Akun PTK. Operator role guards verified: nav-executive/audit hidden, direct nav to /executive /audit /master /kb/new all redirect, /kb (read) allowed, kb-new-button hidden. No backend or critical frontend issues found.

issues: Dashboard widgets take ~3s to fully populate after login redirect. Not a bug, but tests need to wait ~3s before SLA cards/charts query — consider adding a skeleton loader so it is visually obvious that data is loading.

action_items: (Optional) Add a skeleton/loader on Dashboard until /api/dashboard/stats responds — improves perceived performance and removes ambiguity during the ~3s first paint.
(Optional, carry-over from iteration_1) PUT /operators/{uid} update path: dup-email uniqueness IS checked, but consider also ensuring dup-sekolah uniqueness — currently checked, confirmed OK.
(Optional) Consider splitting /app/backend/server.py (now ~1300 lines) into routers (auth, master, tickets, kb, audit, executive, reports) — exceeds 700-line guideline.
critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint POST /api/kb/articles uses Pydantic KbArticleIn but Update uses the same schema; tags default to [] — fine.

log_audit is called on master CRUD (sekolah/operator/kecamatan/kb_category/kb_article) and ticket status_change/assign. Layanan create/update/delete intentionally NOT audited — consider adding for full coverage.
GET /api/audit allows filtering by entity/action/q/from_date/to_date — pagination via skip/limit; total is returned. Good.
Assignment endpoint correctly notifies assignee (when different from actor) and clears assignment when assignee_id=None.
Checklist endpoint POST /tickets/{tid}/checklist: operator-of-ticket OR any koord can update. Activity log records progress count. Good.
TicketsList uses IntersectionObserver + sentinel + fallback button; current dataset has < 30 tickets so load-more-button is conditionally hidden showing 'Semua data dimuat' instead — matches spec.
Role guards on /executive /audit /master /kb/new (frontend) and 403 on backend endpoints — verified working.
Dashboard component takes ~3s to paint after login; not blocking but could use a loading skeleton.
server.py file size now ~1300 lines — should be split into routers for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Tests create+cleanup TEST_ prefixed data; created several tickets during ticket-checklist/assignment/audit tests (left in DB to support audit history). Two KB articles created and deleted. One layanan checklist item 'TEST UI item' added during master-data UI test — please cleanup if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features all functional. Phase 2 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py (20 tests). Real frontend selectors confirmed: SLA cards sla-on-time/sla-almost/sla-late; nav-executive/nav-audit/nav-kb; exec-apply; kb-new-button/kb-search-input/kb-search-button/kb-save-button/kb-edit-button/kb-delete-button; tab-layanan; layanan-checklist-editor/layanan-checklist-input; create-checklist + checklist-item-{i}; ticket-checklist + detail-checklist-{i}; assign-button + assignee-select + confirm-assign + ticket-assignee; infinite-scroll-sentinel + load-more-button (hidden when total<30). Dashboard needs ~3s wait after login redirect before SLA cards query. Operator role guards confirmed for /executive, /audit, /master, /kb/new. /kb read-only allowed for operator (no new/edit/delete buttons).
